summary: Phase D Prompt 2.2 Appraisals Core REFACTOR regression — 18/18 acceptance scenarios from iteration_8.json re-verified PASS against the same preview URL after the AppraisalPage.jsx 1176→232-line split into pages/AppraisalPage.jsx + components/appraisal/{atoms,HeaderTab,UnitsTab,CostsTab,FinanceTab,SummaryTab}.jsx. Every required data-testid hook is preserved and wired correctly. No refactor regressions found.

refactor_checks.testid_hooks_preserved: ALL testids from iteration_8 baseline still resolve — static and dynamic (rlv-panel-${rlvState} → rlv-panel-empty / rlv-panel-calculated / rlv-panel-non_convergence; cost-line-*-${idx}; facility-*-${idx}; unit-*-${idx}; kpi-total-gdv, kpi-total-cost, kpi-profit, kpi-profit-on-cost, kpi-profit-on-gdv, kpi-acq, kpi-build, kpi-fin; server-gdv-kpi, live-gdv-kpi, live-build-kpi all present).
refactor_checks.behavioural_parity: Confirmed identical — HeaderTab save, UnitsTab LIVE decimal.js math (qty*price GDV, price/(gia*10.7639) per sqft), CostsTab auto-badges + manual row add, FinanceTab add/save, SummaryTab KPIs + stale pills, RLV three-state panel transition, submit→approve state machine, reopen visibility, back nav.

verified_scenarios_18.10_units_live_math_instant: PASS (no save round-trip; values update on blur)
verified_scenarios_18.11_server_gdv_kpi_stale: PASS (server-gdv-kpi shows Stale pill while live ≠ saved)
verified_scenarios_18.12_costs_auto_badges: PASS (8 cost-line-auto-badge-N for SDLT_Engine + Finance_Engine + Percentage_Of_* seed lines)
verified_scenarios_18.14_add_cost_line_manual: PASS (add-cost-line-btn → new manual cost-line-amount-N editable input)
verified_scenarios_18.15_finance_facility_testids: PASS (add-facility-btn + facility-interest-0 / facility-fees-0 / facility-save-0 all present)
verified_scenarios_18.16_summary_kpis_render: PASS (8/8 KPI tiles: kpi-total-gdv, kpi-total-cost, kpi-profit, kpi-profit-on-cost, kpi-profit-on-gdv, kpi-acq, kpi-build, kpi-fin; stale-pill count=9 while dirty)
verified_scenarios_18.17_rlv_three_state_transition: PASS (initial rlv-panel-empty=1; after rlv-run-btn with target=20 → rlv-panel-calculated=1, rlv-panel-empty=0, rlv-panel-non_convergence=0 — panel FLIPPED state, did not collapse)
verified_scenarios_18.18_state_machine_and_back_nav: PASS (submit → submitted-banner + header-name disabled; approve → state-badge='Approved' + reopen-appraisal-btn visible; back-to-appraisals-link returned to list)

critical_code_review_comments: Good: all split files are well under the 700-line threshold (largest is UnitsTab.jsx at 224 lines; shell AppraisalPage.jsx at 232).
Good: enum constants and shared atoms (StalePill, Kpi, SectionHeader, Field) properly centralised in atoms.jsx; no duplication.

Minor: atoms.jsx SummaryTab.jsx still contain both static ('rlv-state-empty', 'rlv-state-calculated', 'rlv-state-non-convergence') AND the dynamic ('rlv-panel-${rlvState}') testids on what may be the same panel. If intentional (belt-and-braces for tests), consider a one-line comment; if legacy, the static ones can be dropped. Not a regression — review-request only requires rlv-panel-*.

Minor: onDirty is only wired on input changes (via Field onChange); a fresh unit row added via add-unit-btn does not flip stale to true until the user types — consistent with pre-refactor behaviour but worth confirming with product.
test_credentials: test-admin@example.test / TestUser-Dev-2026! — MFA auto-enrol via pyotp (scripts/seed_test_users.py reset + /api/auth/mfa/enroll/start → /confirm). Cookies (access_token, refresh_token) injected into Playwright context.
seed_data_creation: Re-used existing project 'TEST_Appraisal_E2E' (id=appraisal-revisions) from iteration_8. Created fresh Draft v3 appraisal (id=appraisal-revisions) named 'TEST_Regression_v3' for this sweep; drove it through the full state machine to Approved.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactor regression for Prompt 2.2 is verified GREEN. AppraisalPage.jsx successfully split from 1176 → 232-line shell + 6 per-tab/atom components, all under the 700-line guideline. Every data-testid the review-request spec names resolves on the live preview URL. Two RLV testid naming schemes coexist (dynamic rlv-panel-${state} AND static rlv-state-*); pick one long-term. The TEST_Appraisal_E2E project now has v1=Approved, v2=Rejected, v3=Approved (post-regression sweep) — next agent can reopen v3 for a new draft instead of creating v4.
